subcodes.first_line: O God, whose bounties are hidden! I beseech Thee by Thy Name which overfloweth with justice and equity, and is resplendent with the light of forgiveness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا خفی الالطاف اسئلک باسمک الفائض بالعدل و الانصاف المتجلی بنور العفو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @being a source of light; guidance
